architecture.summary: Frontend-only changes across 6 React components. No state persistence between forms. Regenerate button sits next to AI Edit in EditorPanel toolbar, reuses config provider/model.

integrations.summary: N/A - all frontend-only. Reuses existing /api/skills/generate?sse and /api/skill-creator-status endpoints. No new backend work.

ui-ux.summary: Write/Preview toggle defaults to Write independently per form. Install command shown as copyable code block. Page reload sufficient for refresh. maxHeight 400px with overflow scroll for markdown view.

performance.summary: Keep maxHeight 400px with overflow scroll for markdown rendering. renderMarkdown is lightweight string transform, no perf concern.

security.summary: N/A - frontend-only UI polish. renderMarkdown uses dangerouslySetInnerHTML but content is user-authored SKILL.md, same trust model as existing EditorPanel.

edge-cases.summary: Regeneration in progress: abort first stream then restart (same as handleCancelGenerate pattern). No concurrent modification concerns.
